scripts.build: astro build && npx esbuild src/background.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/background.js && npx esbuild src/utils/readability-wrapper.ts --bundle --outfile=dist/Readability.js
scripts.test: npm run build && web-ext run -s dist
scripts.test:firefox: npm run build && web-ext run -t firefox-desktop -s dist
scripts.test:chromium: npm run build && web-ext run -t chromium -s dist
